regime_read: ES & NQ moving together — broad agreement, more DURABLE directional signal. Trust the direction more.
narrative:
Macro backdrop —
[2026-07-13] US economic state (FRED):
  Growth: real GDP 2.1% (q/q ann)
  Inflation: CPI 3.67% YoY | core CPI 2.26% | core PCE 2.89% (Fed target 2%)
  Labor: unemployment 4.2%
  Rates: fed funds 3.63% | 10Y 4.54% | 10Y-2Y 0.35% (NORMAL)
  Consumer: UMich sentiment 44.8 | VIX 15.84

---
PRE-US-OPEN BRIEFING — ES/NQ (research only; no execution path via OANDA).

1) RECENT MOVE-BY-MOVE READ
Both indices are trading lower into the US open. ES is off ~0.35% on the day (last 7593.25) while NQ is heavier, down ~1.0% (last 29731). The dominant catalyst is unambiguous geopolitics: a cluster of headlines around the Strait of Hormuz closure, IRGC missile activity, and a spike in oil/bond-yield risk. This is a classic risk-off, energy-shock tape — it hits high-multiple, rate-sensitive Nasdaq names harder than the broader S&P, which explains NQ's clear underperformance vs ES today. Note NQ's RSI has bled down to ~41.9 (approaching but not at oversold) while ES's RSI is still neutral at ~54.7 — the pain is concentrated in tech, consistent with a duration/oil shock rather than a broad growth scare. Both remain well above their 200-day SMAs (ES +8.5%, NQ +12.8%), so this is a pullback within an intact primary uptrend, not a trend break. Weekly returns are near flat (ES +0.02%, NQ -0.7%), meaning today's move is largely a one-day geopolitical reprice.

2) VOLUME-PROFILE READ (volume-at-price, NOT order-flow delta — respect that limit)
ES: 5-day POC 7586.31 sits essentially right at current price (7593) and near session VWAP (7588.94). Value area is 7481.46–7621.26. ES is pinned to its high-volume acceptance zone — this is fair-value congestion, not a breakdown. The line in the sand for ES is the value-area low ~7481 and the prior-week low 7468.5; below that, the pullback becomes structural.
NQ: POC 29882 sits ABOVE current price (29731) — NQ has slipped below its heaviest acceptance node, and price is hovering just above session VWAP (29682.61). Value area 29287.98–30051.85. The bulk of recent volume (HVNs at 29882/29938/29910/30051) is clustered overhead, which now acts as supply/resistance. The line in the sand below is the value-area low ~29288 and prior-week low 28909.75. NQ trading below its POC while ES sits on its POC is the mechanical fingerprint of tech-led weakness.

3) NQ/ES LEAD-LAG REGIME
Contemporaneous correlation is high at 0.911 and the regime classifier reads BREADTH — ES and NQ are moving together, so the DOWN direction is more durable/trustworthy than in a rotation tape. However, the lead-lag scan is weak and noisy: best_lag=2 with best_corr only 0.053 and leader=NONE, so there is no reliable cross-instrument leadership signal to trade — the value here is that agreement raises trust in DIRECTION, not that either instrument leads. The system flags divergence=true because NQ is meaningfully underperforming ES on the day even though both are red; treat that as a same-direction, unequal-magnitude move (tech beta), not a genuine rotation. Implication: modest size is justified because the direction is broadly confirmed, but do NOT oversize — a headline-driven geopolitical tape can reverse violently on any de-escalation. Also heed the scorecard: 11 dir-calls, regime accuracy only ~0.30, still CALIBRATING — this is intelligence, not a validated edge.

4) EVENT-CALENDAR AWARENESS
No scheduled data before the open is driving this — it's pure headline risk. Ahead: FOMC 2026-07-29 (~16d), PCE 2026-07-31 (~18d, cadence estimate), ISM Mfg 2026-08-03 (~21d). All are outside the immediate window, so no event-based size reduction is required today. The real sizing constraint right now is EVENT-STYLE headline volatility from the Hormuz/oil situation — treat it like a live event: widen stops relative to a normal day and keep size reduced, because gaps on new geopolitical headlines can blow through technical levels regardless of the profile.

5) SYNTHESIS — META-REGIME + NARROWED BIAS
Meta-regime: risk-off, oil/geopolitical shock inside an intact longer-term uptrend, with BREADTH confirmation to the downside and tech (NQ) as the underperforming leg. Signals are moderately aligned (news is clear and one-directional; lead-lag confirms same-direction movement) but NOT clean enough for high conviction — the lack of any true leadership signal, the still-above-200d structure, and a headline tape that can snap back on de-escalation all cap confidence.
BIAS: SHORT NQ / sell-strength bias, ~48% confidence. Preferred expression is fading rallies back into the overhead HVN/POC supply zone (29882–30052) rather than chasing weakness. Downside targets: VWAP ~29683, then value-area low ~29288, then prior-week low 28910. INVALIDATION: a reclaim and acceptance back above the prior-day high 30077.75 (which also sits at the top of the value area) negates the tech-led-down thesis — above there, breadth flips back to bullish continuation and this short read is void. Given only moderate confidence and a headline-driven tape, size small, respect the geopolitical gap risk, and remember this is a research read, not an executable edge.
